name: UnpacMe
description: UnpacMe automated malware unpacking and binary analysis service that extracts packed, obfuscated, and encrypted payloads from PE executables for threat analysis and detection

actions.name: Upload File
actions.description: Submit a PE file (32-bit or 64-bit, max 100MB) for automated unpacking and payload extraction

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: PE file to unpack (supports raw PE or single-file ZIP archive, max 100MB)

actions.name: Get Unpack Status
actions.description: Check the current processing status of an unpacking submission

parameters.name: unpack_id
parameters.description: Unpack ID returned from the upload submission

actions.name: Get Unpack Results
actions.description: Retrieve the full unpacking results including extracted payloads, YARA matches, and file metadata

parameters.name: unpack_id
parameters.description: Unpack ID to retrieve results for

actions.name: Get Public Unpack Status
actions.description: Check the processing status of a public unpacking submission

parameters.name: unpack_id
parameters.description: Public unpack ID to check status for

actions.name: Get Public Unpack Results
actions.description: Retrieve unpacking results for a public submission

parameters.name: unpack_id
parameters.description: Public unpack ID to get results for

actions.name: Search by Hash
actions.description: Search for parent submissions that contain a specific sample by its hash (SHA256, MD5, or SHA1)

parameters.name: hash
parameters.description: SHA256, MD5, or SHA1 hash to search for across all submissions

actions.name: Download Sample
actions.description: Download a sample (original or extracted payload) by its hash

parameters.name: hash
parameters.description: SHA256 hash of the sample to download

actions.name: Get Submission History
actions.description: Retrieve the user's submission history with pagination

actions.name: Get Unpacked Feed
actions.description: Retrieve the full feed of recently unpacked samples

actions.name: Get Feed by YARA
actions.description: Filter the unpacked feed by a specific YARA rule match

parameters.name: yara_rule
parameters.description: YARA rule name to filter the feed by

actions.name: Get User Access
actions.description: Retrieve user account settings and API access information
